hero.title: Your Smart Partner in Healthcare Journey
hero.subtitle: We are Aman Ever, a leading Saudi technology platform specialized in technical and marketing mediation for medical services

services.title: Most Requested
services.subtitle: We provide a comprehensive range of medical and healthcare services

membership.title: Aman Ever Membership
membership.description: One card.. saves you up to 80% of your healthcare expenses! Choose the coverage that suits you best, and issue your card electronically in just 60 seconds. No prior approvals, and no age restrictions.

packages.title: Comprehensive Care.. Choose What Suits You
packages.subtitle: 8 packages carefully designed to meet everyone's needs; from individuals and families, to companies and special community groups.

calculator.body: Statistics indicate that the average family spending in Saudi Arabia is 4,800 riyals annually on medical and cosmetic services. With Aman Ever, your savings reach 3,400 riyals annually (equivalent to 10 times your subscription value!).

finalCta.title: Hesitant to Choose the Right Package?
finalCta.body: Our team is available now to help you choose the ideal coverage that meets your needs precisely.

cashback.title: Loyalty Program (Cashback)
cashback.description: Get cash back when purchasing the card or with first use of services. Enjoy instant financial returns to your wallet.

points.title: Aman Points Wallet
points.description: Collect your points with every purchase invoice and redeem them for service credit for your future purchases

instantBooking.title: Instant Bookings & Consultations
instantBooking.description: Your doctor is with you wherever you are.. Book your appointment without waiting, or get your medical consultation (voice, video, chat) around the clock.

homeCare.title: Home Care Services
homeCare.description: Comprehensive medical care delivered to your doorstep.. Certified team for medical visits, physiotherapy, and special care for children and the elderly.

store.title: Aman Electronic Store
store.description: A diverse store that brings you medical and cosmetic products and services at discounted prices and non-stop exclusive offers.

medicalNetwork.title: Wide Medical Network
medicalNetwork.description: Direct access to a wide and reliable network of hospitals, specialized centers and pharmacies throughout the Kingdom.

healthNetwork.title: Health & Sports Network
healthNetwork.description: An integrated network including fitness clubs, sports clubs and health clubs for a more vibrant lifestyle.

whyUs.title: Why "Aman Ever" is Your First Choice?
whyUs.subtitle: Features designed specifically to provide you with comprehensive care that suits you, with ease.

inclusive.title: Care That Embraces Everyone
inclusive.description: Because your health knows no boundaries, our services are available to everyone; citizens, residents, and visitors, with love and without any restrictions or exceptions.

coverage.title: Peace of Mind.. Without Prior Approvals
coverage.description: We've overcome all complexities for you. Enjoy wide medical coverage instantly, without waiting for any prior approvals from the company.

speed.title: Your Card Ready in Seconds
speed.description: Your time is precious; that's why we made issuing your electronic card instant through the app, with a support team that accompanies you passionately 24/7.

booking.title: Your Doctor is Always Waiting
booking.description: With a click of a button, book your appointment or get instant medical consultation with elite doctors, wherever you are.

home-care.title: The Hospital.. In Your Home
home-care.description: We bring you the care you deserve to your doorstep; a specialized medical team ensures your comfort and the comfort of your loved ones among your family.

response.title: Instant Response (Your First Consultation is On Us)
response.description: Don't hesitate to ask.. We guarantee you a reliable medical response within 15 minutes. And because your health matters to us, your first question is completely free.

financial.title: Savings Beyond Expectations
financial.description: Enjoy real discounts up to 80%, in addition to cashback and points that reward you with every use.

payment.title: Flexible Payment.. Without Pressure
payment.description: We provide you with multiple electronic payment options, with the possibility of comfortable installment through (Tabby and Tamara) to enjoy care without any financial worry.

transparency.title: Transparency That Gives You Confidence
transparency.description: Make your decision with confidence; the app allows you to view real ratings of medical centers from customers who preceded you in the experience.

partners.title: Aman Partners.. Partners of Trust
partners.subtitle: We are proud of our partnership with a selection of the largest hospitals and medical, health and cosmetic centers in the Kingdom
partners.trustBadge: More than 500+ trusted partners throughout the Kingdom

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Your Smart Partner in Healthcare Journey
about.description: A leading Saudi technology platform connecting you with the best medical and health services in the Kingdom. We provide comprehensive and innovative care solutions supporting Vision 2030 in digital health transformation.

highlights.vision2030: Supporting Saudi Vision 2030 in health and technical transformation
highlights.partners: Network of 500+ trusted medical partners throughout the Kingdom
highlights.technology: Advanced and secure technology for a seamless healthcare experience

network.title: Aman's Wide Network.. Care Without Limits

medical.hospitalsDesc: Wide network of the best hospitals and specialized medical centers

exclusiveDiscounts.title: Invest Your Membership.. Multiply Your Savings
exclusiveDiscounts.description: Because you're part of the Aman Ever family, we've opened the doors of savings with major medical and health brands.. Exclusive offers designed specifically to meet your needs.
exclusiveDiscounts.cta: Get Your Card Now.. Start Saving

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Your Smart Partner in Healthcare Journey
about.intro: We are Aman Ever, a leading Saudi technology platform specialized in technical and marketing mediation. We manage an integrated digital ecosystem and smart applications designed to keep pace with the digital health transformation in line with Saudi Vision 2030.
about.description: We work passionately to be the technical bridge connecting you with elite medical, health, and cosmetic service providers in the Kingdom, offering comprehensive and innovative care solutions that redefine digital health services by combining innovation with the highest quality standards.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: We strive to be a safe bridge connecting the community with medical and cosmetic services, facilitating easy and reliable access with the highest quality and technical standards. We are committed to elevating the patient experience by integrating technology with direct care and providing exclusive financial benefits that give our customers the power of savings and excellence at all times.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To be the leading platform in medical marketing and digital healthcare in Saudi Arabia and the Arab region, actively contributing to achieving Saudi Vision 2030 targets in health and technical transformation.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: We provide a comprehensive range of integrated medical and healthcare services

remoteCare.title: Remote Medical Care
remoteCare.description: Providing medical consultations and appointment scheduling with ease from your home

homeServices.title: Home Services
homeServices.description: Providing healthcare services at the beneficiary's residence with comfort and safety

ecommerce.title: E-Commerce Store
ecommerce.description: Integrated platform for purchasing medical products and services at discounted prices

financial.title: Smart Financial Solutions
financial.description: Offering fixed deals and discounts, with cashback program and points wallet

vision.title: Our Vision and Mission
vision.visionDescription: To be the leading platform in medical marketing and digital healthcare in Saudi Arabia and the Arab region, actively contributing to achieving Saudi Vision 2030 targets in health and technical transformation.
vision.visionGoal: At Aman Ever, we strive to bring about a qualitative shift in the health sector within Saudi Arabia by leveraging the latest technologies to transform the healthcare experience into a comprehensive and seamless digital system.
vision.missionDescription: We strive to be a safe bridge connecting the community with medical and cosmetic services, facilitating easy and reliable access with the highest quality and technical standards. We are committed to elevating the patient experience by integrating technology with direct care and providing exclusive financial benefits that give our customers the power of savings and excellence at all times.

values.title: Our Values
values.subtitle: We are pioneers in integrating technology with medical care to facilitate your access to the best services
values.intro: Driven by a set of values that form the core of our work, where we put human health first and their comfort at the heart of everything we offer

clarity.title: Clarity and Respect
clarity.description: We deal with everyone with transparency and respect, because trust is the foundation of every successful relationship

innovation.title: Simplified Innovation
innovation.description: We always strive to provide innovative medical services that make care closer and easier for everyone

safety.title: Safe Experience
safety.description: We are committed to providing a medical experience you can rely on with safety and peace of mind

partnership.title: Service Partnership
partnership.description: We believe that working together and building strong partnerships is the way to achieve the best possible service
